hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && echo "=== Bord — Diagnostic ==="; echo ""; python3 --version 2>/dev/null && echo "  Python: OK" || echo "  Python: MANQUANT"; node --version 2>/dev/null && echo "  Node.js: OK" || echo "  Node.js: MANQUANT"; [ -d frontend/node_modules ] && echo "  frontend/node_modules: OK" || echo "  frontend/node_modules: MANQUANT (npm install)"; [ -f athlete.db ] && echo "  athlete.db: OK ($(python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect(\"athlete.db\"); print(c.execute(\"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activities\").fetchone()[0])" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) activités)" || echo "  athlete.db: ABSENT (lancer start_bord.sh pour initialiser)"; echo ""; echo "Lancement: bash start_bord.sh"; echo "Créer icône bureau: bash create_app.sh"'
